title: Holiday Market on the Avenue
summary: Our beloved annual Holiday Market returns to Forest Avenue! Shop from 30+ local vendors, enjoy live music, hot cider, and a visit from Santa.
body:
The Forest Avenue BID Holiday Market is back for another year of festive fun. Over two days, more than 30 local artisans, makers, and merchants will set up along the Avenue offering handmade gifts, unique crafts, seasonal treats, and so much more.

Hot cider and cocoa will be available from the BID tent. Live musical performances Saturday and Sunday afternoon. Santa will make appearances both days from 12:00 – 2:00 PM—bring the kids!

Participating Forest Avenue businesses will also offer special in-store promotions during the market weekend. A portion of proceeds from the market supports the BID's beautification and programming fund.
